title: uupd configuration
description: Schema for /etc/uupd/config.json — the Universal Blue Updater's hardware-check thresholds and per-module enable toggles. Tracks the format used by ublue-os/uupd. Update this file in lockstep with src/uupd_compat.rs::UupdConfig.

hardware.description: Pre-update hardware checks. Manual updates always run regardless of these thresholds.

enable.description: Master toggle for the hardware-checks subsystem.

bat-min-percent.description: Minimum battery charge percent. Below this, automatic updates are skipped.

cpu-max-percent.description: Maximum CPU load percent. Above this, automatic updates are skipped.

mem-max-percent.description: Maximum RAM utilization percent. Above this, automatic updates are skipped.

net-max-bytes.description: Maximum sustained network throughput in bytes/second. Above this, automatic updates are skipped to avoid contending with active downloads.

modules.description: Per-module enable/disable controls. Each module has a single 'disable' boolean. Defaults to enabled.

disable.description: When true, this module is skipped entirely during runs.
